# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y nginx python3-flask postgresql redis-server && \
    apt-get clean

# Configure Nginx
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

# Set up API server
COPY api /app/api
WORKDIR /app/api
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Set up database
COPY init_db.sql /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/

# Expose ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Start services
CMD service redis-server start && \
    service postgresql start && \
    service nginx start && \
    flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8080 --no-reload

# Set default command
CMD ["bash"]
